# Frenix AI Gateway
https://frenix.sh

A high-performance orchestration layer providing a single API for 150+ LLMs.

## Overview
Frenix is an AI gateway that simplifies model orchestration. It provides a unified, OpenAI-compatible REST interface for models from OpenAI, Anthropic, Google DeepMind, Meta, Mistral, Grok, and others.

## Core Capabilities
- **Unified API**: Access any model through one endpoint.
- **Latency-Aware Routing**: Automatic provider selection for minimal latency.
- **Smart Failover**: Automatic rerouting to fallback models (e.g., Poixe, Gemini) during outages.
- **Edge Caching**: Sub-1ms response times for repeated queries.
- **Enterprise Security**: Key rotation, PII redaction, and RBAC.

## Strategic Partners
- **Exa.ai**: Sponsored by Exa.ai to provide advanced neural search and real-time web research capabilities for AI agents.

## Important Links
- Documentation: https://frenix.sh/docs
- Blog Index: https://frenix.sh/blog
- Dashboard: https://frenix.sh/dashboard
- Pricing: https://frenix.sh/pricing
- Status: https://frenix.sh/status

### Performance & Benchmarks
- **Apache Bench Report**: Performance analysis of routing overhead. (https://frenix.sh/blog/apache-bench-performance-report)
- **SWE-bench Results**: How Axion (Frenix's internal model) performs on software engineering tasks. (https://frenix.sh/blog/axion-1-5-pro-swe-bench-2)

- **OpenRouter Alternative**: Why developers are switching to Frenix. (https://frenix.sh/compare/openrouter-alternative)

- **Axion vs Claude Sonnet 4.6**: Benchmarking speed and coding intelligence. (https://frenix.sh/blog/axion-vs-claude-sonnet-4-6)

### Security & Compliance
- **PII Redaction**: How to scrub sensitive data at the gateway level. (https://frenix.sh/blog/pii-redaction-at-the-edge)
- **GDPR Compliance**: Data residency and privacy in AI orchestration. (https://frenix.sh/blog/gdpr-and-data-residency)
- **SOC2 Guide**: Preparing your AI infrastructure for audit. (https://frenix.sh/blog/soc2-compliance-guide)

### Implementation Workflows
- **Building AI Agents**: A guide to autonomous agentic loops. (https://frenix.sh/blog/building-ai-agents)
